en_title: Disco Elysium Dev ZA/UM Announces Layoffs Affecting Up to 32 Staff
cn_title: 《极乐迪斯科》开发商ZA/UM宣布裁员最多32人
subtitle: 「我们会坚持」
opus_summary: 《极乐迪斯科》开发商ZA/UM在《Zero Parades: For Dead Spies》发售两个月后宣布裁员，最多影响32人。工作室称新作虽获好评，但商业表现不足以维持现有规模。

paragraphs.en: Disco Elysium developer ZA/UM has announced layoffs affecting up to 32 staff just two months after launching .
paragraphs.cn: 《极乐迪斯科》开发商ZA/UM在推出[原文此处缺失内容]仅两个月后宣布裁员，最多影响32名员工。

paragraphs.en: The UK-based studio published a statement regarding the changes on its X/Twitter account. It says that, despite releasing its latest game in May to "critical acclaim, its commercial performance has not enabled us to sustain a studio of our current size."
paragraphs.cn: 这家英国工作室在X账号上发布声明说明调整情况。声明称，尽管最新游戏于5月发售后「广受评论界赞誉，但它的商业表现无法让我们维持目前的工作室规模」。

paragraphs.en: "We have served redundancy or at-risk notices impacting up to 32 of our colleagues across all departments at ZA/UM Studio," the message said. "Their work has made a lasting difference and left its mark on Zero Parades: For Dead Spies, and the studio as a whole."
paragraphs.cn: 声明称：「我们已向ZA/UM Studio各部门最多32名同事发出裁员或岗位风险通知。他们的工作带来了长久影响，在《Zero Parades: For Dead Spies》和整个工作室都留下了印记。」

paragraphs.en: ZA/UM said it will continue to "consult and work with" members of its Workers' Alliance union throughout the "difficult process." The message added that the layoffs will change "the shape of ZA/UM, but not its purpose."
paragraphs.cn: ZA/UM表示，在这段「艰难的过程中」，将继续与Workers' Alliance工会成员「协商并合作」。声明还称，裁员会改变「ZA/UM的形态，但不会改变它的目标」。

paragraphs.en: "Our artistic standards remain unchanged: we will persist," it continued. "To anyone currently hiring, please consider the colleagues leaving ZA/UM.
paragraphs.cn: 声明继续写道：「我们的艺术标准不会改变：我们会坚持下去。也请正在招聘的各位考虑即将离开ZA/UM的同事。」

paragraphs.en: The 2020s have been rough for ZA/UM. Trouble truly began in early October 2022, when multiple key developers – including writer and designer Robert Kurvitz, writer Helen Hindpere, and art and design lead Aleksander Rostov – were said to have left the studio involuntarily . Just weeks later, it was revealed that Kurvitz had launched a lawsuit against the company , with both he and Rostov Ilmar Kompus and Tõnis Haavel of Tütreke OÜ had obtained control of ZA/UM "by fraud." ZA/UM denied these claims while launching their own accusations in a statement sent to Gamesindustry.biz .
paragraphs.cn: 2020年代对ZA/UM而言并不好过。麻烦真正始于2022年10月初，当时有消息称，包括编剧兼设计师Robert Kurvitz、编剧Helen Hindpere和美术与设计主管Aleksander Rostov在内的多名核心开发者并非自愿离开工作室。仅数周后，Kurvitz被曝起诉公司；他与Rostov指控Ilmar Kompus和Tütreke OÜ的Tõnis Haavel「通过欺诈」取得ZA/UM控制权。ZA/UM否认这些说法，并在发给GamesIndustry.biz的声明中反过来提出指控。

paragraphs.en: As things unwound behind the scenes, a series of spinoff studios made up of former ZA/UM developers have emerged. Dark Math Games and Longdue Games announced their projects , XXX Nightshift and Hopetown , in October 2024, with Summer Eternal revealing itself shortly after.
paragraphs.cn: 随着幕后局势不断恶化，多家由ZA/UM前开发者组成的衍生工作室相继出现。Dark Math Games和Longdue Games于2024年10月分别公布项目《XXX Nightshift》和《Hopetown》，Summer Eternal也在不久后亮相。

paragraphs.en: With years of controversy under its belt, today's layoffs aren't ZA/UM's first. In 2024, it was reported that around 24 employees had been impacted by layoffs. The same update brought word that a standalone Disco Elysium expansion had been canceled.
paragraphs.cn: 经历多年争议后，今天的裁员并非ZA/UM第一次缩编。2024年曾有报道称，约24名员工受到裁员影响；同一则消息还透露，一款独立的《极乐迪斯科》扩展内容已被取消。

paragraphs.en: Disco Elysium won ZA/UM multiple categories at The Game Awards 2019 and earned a 9.6/10 review from IGN at the time of its launch. While Zero Parades: For Dead Spies didn't seem to live up to the high bar set by its predecessor, it still boasts an 83 from critics on following its May 21, 2026, launch for PC and PS5. For more on ZA/UM, you can read IGN's breakdown for the full wild story behind what's happened at the studio .
paragraphs.cn: 《极乐迪斯科》曾帮助ZA/UM在2019年游戏大奖中斩获多个奖项，发售时也获得IGN 9.6/10的评分。《Zero Parades: For Dead Spies》似乎未能达到前作树立的高度，但在2026年5月21日登陆PC和PS5后，评论家评分仍达到83分。
